finding: Patch plan has 55 columns matching data/ibd_omics_datasets.csv names and order.
Proposed IDs DS120-DS122 are available after current max DS119; no duplicate IDs or exact accession strings in the current registry.
TRUE/FALSE/Unclear and Yes/No/Partial/Unclear fields use local conventions.
PRJEB18471 sample-size wording is conservative and notes the 118-subject/555-sample source count versus larger archive run/accession counts.
recommended_fix: Keep the caveat; do not treat archive run totals as biological samples without run-to-sample reconciliation.

finding: PRJEB18471 assay labels avoid an unsupported shotgun-metagenomics claim and use microbiome/metagenomic-profiling language.
recommended_fix: Keep conservative assay wording unless methods/source metadata are verified more deeply.

finding: GSE112611 countability is Unclear because it belongs to the broad RISK family and public metadata do not resolve overlap with DS005/DS040/DS041.
recommended_fix: If implemented, add DS121 to unclear_countability_resolution_plan.csv and unclear_countability_review_pack.csv.

finding: ST003312 and ST003313 are represented as one combined serum/fecal metabolomics family row counted once, avoiding duplicate cohort counting.
recommended_fix: Keep one row with both accessions; do not split into independent serum and feces cohort rows.

finding: Patch rows use curation_status='Patch plan; source checked', which is not a current main-registry convention.
recommended_fix: Before implementation, change to a local convention such as 'Systematic discovery; source checked' or another approved source-checked status.
